overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through the industrial district of Saint Denis. The character navigates muddy streets lined with brick factories and warehouses, passing horse-drawn carriages and pedestrians under an overcast, smoky sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial alley with brick warehouses

events.description: character navigates around a wooden wagon cart parked on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy street, passing NPCs standing near building entrances

notable_agents.action: man leaning against brick wall near wooden door

entered.detail: tall brick industrial building with weathered wooden doors and metal fire escape
empty wooden wagon with red paint parked on the dirt street
painted sign reading STAGE CO on the brick building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow industrial alley with tall brick warehouses on the left. A wooden wagon cart sits parked on the muddy street ahead. The atmosphere is hazy with smoke from distant factories, and sparse NPCs stand near building entrances.

scene_state.functional_zone: Saint Denis city entrance with decorative iron archway

events.description: character passes under the large iron Saint Denis archway marking the city entrance
horse-drawn carriage passes from right to left across the street

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the archway entrance, navigating around horse traffic

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two white horses moving across the intersection

entered.detail: large decorative iron archway with SAINT DENIS lettering spanning the street
black wrought iron fence with stone pillars running along the sidewalk
large multi-story brick factory building with tall windows and industrial signage

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes under the ornate Saint Denis archway, transitioning from the narrow alley into a wider industrial thoroughfare. Horse-drawn carriages move through the intersection, and large factory buildings become visible in the distance beyond the gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial factory district with cotton mill and smokestacks

events.description: view opens to reveal multiple factory smokestacks emitting black smoke into the sky

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the muddy industrial road, passing workers near factory gates

entered.detail: tall brick smokestacks billowing black smoke against the gray sky
elevated wooden water tower visible above the factory rooftops
brick industrial building with large green arched doors and decorative stonework

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the heart of the industrial district, with the massive cotton mill dominating the right side of the street. Factory smokestacks rise in the background against the hazy sky, and the muddy road shows heavy wagon wheel ruts. Workers in period clothing walk along the sidewalks near the factory gates.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between industrial district and greener outskirts

events.description: rider on horseback passes by from behind and overtakes the character on the right
industrial buildings give way to trees and open green space ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the road as the environment transitions from industrial to residential outskirts

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback trotting past the character along the street

entered.detail: circular hanging sign for Beaumont Reading establishment attached to brick building
row of mature trees marking the edge of the industrial district and beginning of parkland

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the Beaumont Reading establishment as the industrial architecture begins to thin out. A horse rider overtakes the character on the right. Ahead, the street opens into a greener area with mature trees lining the road, marking the transition from the factory district to the outskirts of town.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a smoggy industrial corridor that gradually opens into the greener outskirts of town. It begins in a narrow alley flanked by tall brick warehouses and parked wooden wagons, where the air is thick with factory smoke. As the character moves forward, the scene expands through an ornate archway into a wider thoroughfare filled with horse-drawn carriages and distant factory gates. The camera then tracks deeper into the heart of the district, passing a massive cotton mill and deep wagon ruts in the mud before the industrial architecture begins to thin near the Beaumont Reading establishment. Finally, the street opens up as a horse rider passes by, and the gray brickwork gives way to a road lined with mature trees.
